revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:1 nguŏk 12 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:1月12日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 1월 12일]][[zh-min-nan:1 goe̍h 12 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:正月十二]][[zh:正月十二]]
{{Not to be confused with|January 12|qq=January 12}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=一月十二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 1월 12일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar January|qq=}} '''January 12''' is the 12th day of month {{ill|Zhengyue|en|Zhengyue|qid=Q1072983|lt=January (Mutsuki)|1=Zhengyue}} the 1st month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Kōrei|en|Emperor Kōrei|qid=Q313041|lt=Emperor Kōrei|1=Emperor Kōrei}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|290 BC|en|290 BC|qid=Q79947|lt=290 BC|1=290 BC}} {{ill|February 19|en|February 19|qid=Q2340|lt=February 19|1=February 19}}） – Legendary enthronement of {{ill|Emperor Kōrei|en|Emperor Kōrei|qid=Q313041|lt=Emperor Kōrei|1=Emperor Kōrei}} as the 7th Emperor of Japan.{{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * [[:en:Chen Dynasty|Chen Dynasty]] falls – {{ill|Emperor Wen of Sui|en|Emperor Wen of Sui|qid=Q7418|lt=Emperor Wen of Sui|1=Emperor Wen of Sui}} conquers the [[:en:Chen Dynasty|Chen Dynasty]] and unifies China. ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|589|en|589|qid=Q31429|lt=589|1=589}} {{ill|February 2|en|February 2|qid=Q2313|lt=February 2|1=February 2}}){{Citation needed|date=2021-03|qq=}} * {{ill|Shōtoku|en|Shōtoku|qid=Q360354|lt=Shōtoku|1=Shōtoku}} 4th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1714|en|1714|qid=Q6878|lt=1714|1=1714}} {{ill|February 26|en|February 26|qid=Q2359|lt=February 26|1=February 26}}） – [[Eshima]] is late returning to the inner chambers of {{ill|Ōoku|en|Ōoku|qid=Q1064983|lt=Ōoku|1=Ōoku}} after a party with kabuki actor [[Ikushima Shingorō]], triggering the [[Eshima-Ikushima affair]].
== Births == * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1562|en|1562|qid=Q6621|lt=1562|1=1562}} {{ill|February 15|en|February 15|qid=Q2334|lt=February 15|1=February 15}}） – [[Maeda Toshinaga]], 2nd daimyo of {{ill|Kaga Domain|en|Kaga Domain|qid=Q903448|lt=Kaga Domain|1=Kaga Domain}} (d. {{ill|1614|en|1614|qid=Q6781|lt=1614|1=1614}}). * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} {{ill|February 26|en|February 26|qid=Q2359|lt=February 26|1=February 26}}） – [[Kawaguchi Ekai]], Buddhist scholar and explorer of Tibet (d. {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}}). * [[Meiji]] 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} {{ill|February 22|en|February 22|qid=Q2351|lt=February 22|1=February 22}}） – {{ill|Okada Saburōsuke|en|Okada Saburōsuke|qid=Q11473409|lt=Okada Saburōsuke|1=Okada Saburōsuke}}, Western-style painter (d. {{ill|1939|en|1939|qid=Q18639|lt=1939|1=1939}}).
== Deaths ==
== Commemorations ==
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|1|11|1|13|12|12|2|1|0112|qq=}}
